description: Letter from an unknown person to Nahray b. Nissim. Around 1060 (Gil). The fragment contains several details about shipments of goods and money as well as a complaint about Abū Zikrī that he acted in an indecent manner toward the writer when they were business partners. It seems like the writer is from Sicily. Mentions that lbn ʿAbd al-Raḥmān (Ibn al-Baʿbāʿ) was transporting a pouch full of dirhams. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #817)
description_he: שרידי מכתב לנהראי בן ניסים, כ-1060, על משלוחי סחורות וכסף ועל תלונה על אבו זכרי שנהג ביראוי בשותפות
